## Safety / Reliability Impact
- [ ] Life-critical SOS path
- [ ] Offline or low-connectivity behavior
- [ ] Identity, QR, or authority verification
- [ ] Geofence, navigation, or trip safety
- [ ] Operational dashboard visibility
- [ ] No direct safety impact
